languages.text: "Я найду Багряную пляску Кхейна, и вместе мы покончим с ксеносом". {n}Себериан сжимает перед собой кулак, будто ненавистный клинок уже покоится в его ладони.{/n}
"So I will find the Crimson Dance of Khaine, and together we will vanquish the xenos." {n}Seberian raises a hand and clenches his fist, as though the detested blade were already in his grasp.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Я найду Багряную пляску Кхейна, и вместе мы покончим с ксеносом". {n}Себериан сжимает перед собой кулак, будто ненавистный клинок уже покоится в его ладони.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "I will find the Sword of Bloody-Handed Fury, and together we will vanquish the xenos." {n}Seberian holds out a hand and clenches his fist, as though the detested blade were already in his palm.{/n}
"I will find the Sword of Bloody-Handed Fury, and together we will vanquish the xenos." {n}Seberian holds out a hand and clenches his fist, as though the detested blade were already in his palm.{/n}
"So I will find the Crimson Dance of Khaine, and together we will vanquish the xenos." {n}Seberian raises a hand and clenches his fist, as though the detested blade were already in his grasp.{/n}
"So I will find the Crimson Dance of Khaine, and together we will vanquish the xenos." {n}Seberian raises a hand and clenches his fist, as though the detested blade were already in his grasp.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich werde also den Blutroten Tanz von Khaine finden, und dann werden wir den Xenos gemeinsam vernichten." {n}Seberian hebt eine Hand und ballt sie zur Faust, als hätte er die verhasste Klinge schon gefunden.{/n}
languages.original_text: "So I will find the Crimson Dance of Khaine, and together we will vanquish the xenos." {n}Seberian raises a hand and clenches his fist, as though the detested blade were already in his grasp.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde also den Blutroten Tanz von Khaine finden, und dann werden wir den Xenos gemeinsam vernichten." {n}Seberian hebt eine Hand und ballt sie zur Faust, als hätte er die verhasste Klinge schon gefunden.{/n}

languages.text: « Alors, je vais trouver la Danse écarlate de Khaine, et ensemble, nous vaincrons le xénos. » {n}Seberian lève une main et serre le poing, comme déjà refermé autour de la lame honnie.{/n}
languages.original_text: "So I will find the Crimson Dance of Khaine, and together we will vanquish the xenos." {n}Seberian raises a hand and clenches his fist, as though the detested blade were already in his grasp.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Alors, je vais trouver la Danse écarlate de Khaine, et ensemble, nous vaincrons le xénos. » {n}Seberian lève une main et serre le poing, comme déjà refermé autour de la lame honnie.{/n}

languages.text: «Encontraré la Danza Carmesí de Khaine y juntos acabaremos con los xenos». {n}Seberian alza una mano y aprieta el puño, como si la odiosa espada ya estuviera en su posesión.{/n}
languages.original_text: "So I will find the Crimson Dance of Khaine, and together we will vanquish the xenos." {n}Seberian raises a hand and clenches his fist, as though the detested blade were already in his grasp.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Encontraré la Danza Carmesí de Khaine y juntos acabaremos con los xenos». {n}Seberian alza una mano y aprieta el puño, como si la odiosa espada ya estuviera en su posesión.{/n}

languages.text: "O yüzden Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı'nı bulacağım. Zenoları birlikte yeneceğiz." {n}Seberian, sanki o iğrenç kılıç çoktan elindeymiş gibi elini kaldırıp yumruğunu sıkıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "So I will find the Crimson Dance of Khaine, and together we will vanquish the xenos." {n}Seberian raises a hand and clenches his fist, as though the detested blade were already in his grasp.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "O yüzden Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı'nı bulacağım. Zenoları birlikte yeneceğiz." {n}Seberian, sanki o iğrenç kılıç çoktan elindeymiş gibi elini kaldırıp yumruğunu sıkıyor.{/n}

languages.text: “所以，我会找到‘凯恩的猩红之舞’，然后我们一同战胜那异形。”{n}塞贝里安举起手，紧握成拳，仿佛已将那把可憎的剑握在手中。{/n}
languages.original_text: "So I will find the Crimson Dance of Khaine, and together we will vanquish the xenos." {n}Seberian raises a hand and clenches his fist, as though the detested blade were already in his grasp.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “所以，我会找到‘凯恩的猩红之舞’，然后我们一同战胜那异形。”{n}塞贝里安举起手，紧握成拳，仿佛已将那把可憎的剑握在手中。{/n}

languages.text: 「そう、私はカイヌの紅舞を手に入れ、共に異種族を打ち破るだろう。」{n}セベリアンは手を挙げ、拳を握りしめた。まるで憎悪の刃が既に彼の手に握られているかのように。{/n}
languages.original_text: "So I will find the Crimson Dance of Khaine, and together we will vanquish the xenos." {n}Seberian raises a hand and clenches his fist, as though the detested blade were already in his grasp.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「そう、私はカイヌの紅舞を手に入れ、共に異種族を打ち破るだろう。」{n}セベリアンは手を挙げ、拳を握りしめた。まるで憎悪の刃が既に彼の手に握られているかのように。{/n}
